architecture.description: Use functional components with hooks, avoid class components
Extract business logic into custom hooks, keep components focused on presentation

naming_conventions.description: Components: PascalCase (Calculator.tsx), hooks: camelCase with 'use' prefix (useCalculator.ts), services: camelCase
TypeScript interfaces: PascalCase with 'I' prefix or descriptive names (CalculatorState, HistoryEntry)

presentation_layer.description: One component per file, keep components small and reusable
Use TypeScript for all component props, avoid 'any' type

testing.description: Write unit tests for custom hooks and services using Vitest
Test component rendering and user interactions
